title: BlackBerry Q4 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Fall Y/Y
text: BlackBerry Limited reported fourth-quarter fiscal 2022 results for the period ended February 28, 2022, with year-over-year top-line contraction. The EPS was $0.25 in Q4 compared to -$0.56 in the same period the previous year. Excluding items, BlackBerry reported adjusted earnings of $6 million or $0.01 per share for the period. The Zacks Consensus Estimate was a loss of 3 cents per share. Quarterly total revenues declined 11.9% year over year to $185 million. Cybersecurity revenue was $122 million, and IoT revenue was $52 million. For fiscal 2023, BlackBerry expected revenues in the range of $200-$210 million, indicating 12-18% growth year over year. Cyber business billings growth was expected within 8-12% due to increased uptake of security products.
